The Hyper Seed Launch:
Webinars and Summits
Module 6
The “Show Me The Money” Method
• This one is more complicated and harder to pull
off
• It builds your list and makes you money at the
same time
• You can build a serious business following this
model
• Avoid the shenanigans though and be ethical -
always
The “Show Me The Money” Method
• It starts off similar to the “Product Build Out”
• You line up a series of experts willing to be
interviewed on a teleseminar or webinar
• 60 minutes of content – then 10-15 minute pitch
for their product at the end
• Often using an affiliate link where you get a cut of
the sales
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Lining up experts to interview…
• Let the expert know it will be part of a series
• Line up 6 – 8 experts to interview
• Use social proof of other experts (strong experts
will attract other experts)
• Be honest with advertising who has agreed to
participate (vs. who you invited to participate,
but have not confirmed)
Growing your list and revenue with each
interview…
• Ask the experts to email their list about the
webinar or teleseminar
• This is how you can build your list quickly
• Each expert you interview emails their list about
their interview, and your list grows when they
register
• Then you have a bigger list to email about the
next interview, and more people on the line
and more potential customers for the offer
made at the end of the call
Getting the experts to say yes…
• The toughest thing is getting that first guru to say
yes and to mail their list
• Attend an event where they’re speaking
• Following them on social media
• Post helpful comments on their blog
• Buy their products or be an affiliate for them
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Getting the experts to say yes…
• You want to work hard to build a relationship – to
get on their radar
• Then eventually ask them for the interview and to
mail to their list about the interview
”Show Me The Money”
• There’s a pitch at the end of each call where you
get an affiliate commission
• Sometimes you might waive the commission to
get the expert to say yes to the interview to
have them in your line-up
• After the call you email your list with the replay
and follow up with an email reiterating the offer
made in the interview
• Make sure there’s a deadline – a reason to act
”Show Me The Money”
• Again – the toughest part is getting the first
expert to participate
• It’s not so easy to do this in the internet marketing
world (although it’s not impossible)
• It’s 10 times easier in niches outside of internet
marketing
• It’s worked really well in all kinds of niche markets
• It takes some work, but it’s very doable
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Some resources you’ll need…
• You need the ability to mute and unmute
individual lines and there are services you can
use that offer this
• For Teleseminars
• Instant Teleseminar
• GoToWebinar
• Voice Text
• FreeConferenceCall.com
• Lots of others…
Some resources you’ll need…
• For Webinars
• Instant Teleseminar
• GoToWebinar
• (and Zoom)
Seed Launches are a powerful way to build a
product…
• You can do it with a very small list
• Having a product is powerful
• Let’s you attract JV Partners and affiliates
• The Hyper Seed Launch is a great way to start
from scratch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
